[2018-06-01 09:40] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Throwback to challenge 6, where Battery was my favorite.
"Keyword: Battery N
At the start of your turn every unit with Battery gains one charge (up to a maximum of N). When a Battery unit gets clicked, all charges get depleted and the click ability gets activated once per charge."

Layered Armor (6 :Gold: :Green: , 1 Supply) 3 :Fragile: 
Battery 2
Click: construct a Barrier

Replicase Reservoir (4 :Gold: :Energy: :Drone: , 1 Supply) 2 :Health: 
As an additional cost, consume a Drone.
Battery 3
Click: gain 1 :Gold: :Red: 

"Chill Math is too Easy" Ray (2 :Gold: :Green: :Green: , 4 Supply) 1 :Health: 
Battery 4
Click: :Chill: 1 (add chill to target unit equal to the number of charges on CMITE Ray)

:Blocker: , :Lifespan: 4?
:Click: : Gain :Gold:
[2018-06-01 20:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): that's basically doomed drone lol
[2018-06-01 20:14] http404error: That's been the theme of Kenshru's designs lately, I think
[2018-06-01 20:14] http404error: fragile 1hp is amusing though
[2018-06-01 20:16] kaelii: I've been making a whole bunch of sorta doomed drones, mostly just to see what kind of ways I can push the design with various colors.
[2018-06-01 20:24] kaelii: Its very similar to doomed drone but also a fair bit different. Two energy and green makes it MUCH less efficient at early econ ramp, but if you can ignore one or both of the energy in the cost it is a more efficient soak than doomed drone. It probably makes P1 DD->DD->DDEC a viable pivot off of a DD->DD->DDA plan.

Green's a bit weird of a color for Doomed Drone variants because green's special archetype is breachproof which doesn't really fit along doomed drone without possible other problems.

Construct an Auric Impulse and a Gauss Charge.

Is this broken?
[2018-06-04 18:09] shadourow (Rando): The absorb denial makes this unit a strictly better auric impulse
[2018-06-04 18:09] shadourow (Rando): So, I think it's broken
[2018-06-04 18:09] namington: Yeah seems pretty broken
[2018-06-04 18:10] namington: Itd also be broken if it costed 4
[2018-06-04 18:10] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Really? I thought it would be weak at 4ex
[2018-06-04 18:10] namington: But itd be quite good
[2018-06-04 18:10] shadourow (Rando): I don't know, deny one absorb is worth around 2 golds, right ?
[2018-06-04 18:11] namington: Its worth whatever 1 BV is
[2018-06-04 18:11] namington: Which is usually slightly over 2 gold
[2018-06-04 18:11] namington: So that unit, in exchange for being slightly inefficient by not spending the gold immediately, would generate ~50% profit
[2018-06-04 18:12] namington: Assuming the attack gets absorbed the turn you buy it but not the next turn
[2018-06-04 18:12] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): So 4ex comes out to 4.3->6.1 but only if it denies absorb
[2018-06-04 18:12] namington: So maybe it'd be balanced at 4 gold, but it'd be quite good
[2018-06-04 18:13] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... I think the unit is fine at 4E, yup
[2018-06-04 18:13] namington: Its worth noting that energy only has a cost early on, or if you have energy using units
[2018-06-04 18:13] namington: BUT absorb denial is most useful early on also
[2018-06-04 18:13] namington: So that adds to the cost
[2018-06-04 18:13] namington: So yeah, it'd probably be fine at 4ex
[2018-06-04 18:17] wilson0862 (Wilson): What? No, this isn't a strictly better auric.
[2018-06-04 18:17] wilson0862 (Wilson): Most of the time you aren't denying absorb and in those situations it is worse.
[2018-06-04 18:18] namington: Yeah, it isn't strictly better
[2018-06-04 18:18] namington: But the situations in which it's good, it seems broken in
[2018-06-04 18:18] shadourow (Rando): Auric is rarely use at the end of games, right ? But ok, indeed, not strictly better
[2018-06-04 18:18] wilson0862 (Wilson): There are situations you want the auric effect without the damage delay and situations you want the auric but don't have a damage.
[2018-06-04 18:19] wilson0862 (Wilson): It's usually at the beginning of games before you even have damage that auric is good right?
[2018-06-04 18:19] wilson0862 (Wilson): In which case, you just straight up can't buy it.
[2018-06-04 18:20] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Swordic Impulse 1.1 (4 :Gold: :Energy: :Attack: , 20 Supply) Spell
Construct an Auric Impulse and a Gauss Charge.
"'This unit has a negative inflation rate, who would ever buy that' - 200 iq player while attacking into wall"
[2018-06-04 18:20] wilson0862 (Wilson): I've also played enough degen ebb games where you want auric late but don't want to delay damage.
[2018-06-04 18:21] shadourow (Rando): But I think, 4non, that this unit can be annoying, as it increase the advantage of getting the 1st attacker
[2018-06-04 18:21] wilson0862 (Wilson): Is it any more annoying than any other absorb denial unit?
[2018-06-04 18:22] f300xen (f0x): the good absorb denial units want you to get to 2 or 3 attack
[2018-06-04 18:22] wilson0862 (Wilson): I just find it a weird pairing in terms of effects.
[2018-06-04 18:22] wilson0862 (Wilson): Auride core costs 1 attack to use. But that's fair.
[2018-06-04 18:23] shadourow (Rando): Absorb denial units are really annoying, that much that I embargo Bloodrager 😐
[2018-06-04 18:23] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I just wanted a ?ex unit and this is what came to my mind
[2018-06-04 18:23] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): If you have other ideas, go for it.

[2018-06-05 23:57] masn6811 (Masne98888): Thoughts: I don't really like tiny profit as a unit, as it doesn't impact the set much, but doesn't really do much to fix p1/p2 adv either unlike say doomed drone. (It does enable elyot animus, but that's it)
Shield generator: green absorb REEEE, but mahar already set the precedent. in any case, i think it's a really cool unit, with both a absorb mode and a soak mode, both nicely balanced.
[2018-06-05 23:58] masn6811 (Masne98888): Sparktron: My unit, so I'd be biased here, but I like it
[2018-06-06 00:00] masn6811 (Masne98888): Two-punch johnny: This one is weird. Overtuned (better than bolt, and bolt is already really strong), but has weird tech. I see people getting two forges to chain them, and it also is an incredibly efficient tech sink. I'm especially scared of high power levels on such small units. As far as the concept goes, I find it both unnessasary in the unit pool, and inelegant for the effect (just making a stack of gauss charges or something is a lot simpler)
[2018-06-06 00:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): The ticker: Creates much imba, player adv, and unhealthy play patterns. p2's DC/Ticker is incredibly powerful, or even p1's C/Ticker or Double galv+C/ticker. (Yes, it can be shot down, but it's just an unbeatable economic advantage with a ematrix in the set) Please don't pick this as the winner
[2018-06-06 00:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): Canis Deprecius: Pretty substacial amount of threat and shock in red mirrors, it's an interesting design, and quite powerful. The only thing I'm afraid of is in red mirrors it might boil down to who buys them first, as the blocker on the first defends against the second's threat. But then again, the threat to sac it immediately isn't that big if you're only breaching drones, so it could be fine
[2018-06-06 00:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): Protocol grinding drone: Weird ossi variant. Could be really strong. My main concern with this is the power level in a set without a blue sink (mainly pixie) is vastly different with the power level in a set with a blue sink
[2018-06-06 00:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): Turbo Tech: Again, complaint here is power level variability. There's a huge difference between making your splitters prompt with making an omega or dgrid prompt. (in the case of making your splitters prompt, it's kinda a lifespan 4 3hp infusion grid). Also, it has a weird interaction with dgrid, lowering its lifespan by 1. (devs found this confused people, which is why they avoid prompt + ls)
[2018-06-06 00:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): Orizuru: Cool idea, but I'm wary of giving big red such a powerful blocker. (Corpus doesn't fit with an RRR turn and has 4 supply, husk is somewhat inefficient, perf is nonprompt.) Also, as it stands, big red already has a lot of support. But i think it would be cool to see this in the game in place of corpus or something.
[2018-06-06 00:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): Gauss slingshot: Frontline + fragile debate again NotLikeThis. Aside from that, I think it's too strong. Shredder rush isn't too mediocre, and it's a very sharp unit. Such an increase in efficiency might make p2's DC/1C/11/11.. unbeatbale
[2018-06-06 00:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): Hodgepodge bot: Please do not select this as a winner. Not even looking at design, it doesn't really fit the challenge, as neither downside keyword is relevant. Also, it's broken as all heck. And he didn't even bother to spell units correctly
[2018-06-06 00:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): Gaussite cycle: Very inelegant imo. By far the best use here would be to pop the goosites right away, so it might as well have that text instead of doing the shenanigans as gsymb. Also, EXTREMELY overtuned regarding that, as I think the fastest possible rush might be unbeatable
[2018-06-06 00:16] liadahlia (Lia): cmon frontline + fragile makes perfect sense
[2018-06-06 00:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): like i know my sparktron is slightly overtuned, but im making these complaints because two-punch johnny is overtuned on an extremely small unit, and hodgepodge bot and gaussite cycle are overtuned by like a ratio of 2
[2018-06-06 00:17] http404error: Thanks for all your feedback MasN, I really appreciate the discussion
[2018-06-06 00:18] masn6811 (Masne98888): I think I'll end by feedback there, as I looked over all units with +1 total score or more
[2018-06-06 00:18] liadahlia (Lia): hodgepodge bot's effect is pointless
[2018-06-06 00:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): In summary, I like Shield Generator and Sparktron. Canis, Orizuzu, and Gauss Slingshot aren't as well designed, but are still decent units. (though the third requires balance tuning) As for the rest, they all have one design flaw or another, and I'll be kind of sad if any of them win.
